# Automaticky generovano z game/common/parties/*.txt

PARTY_3_TYPE = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = agrarian_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_agrarian_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = anarchist_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_anarchist_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = communist_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_communist_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_conservative_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = fascist_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_fascist_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = free_trade_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_free_trade_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = liberal_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_liberal_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = military_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_military_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = radical_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_radical_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = religious_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_religious_party
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = social_democrats_party
      }
    }
    localization_key = debug_social_democrats_party
  }
}

PARTY_N_PARTY = {
  type = party
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:AUS
        					c:AUS ?= THIS
        					any_interest_group = {
        						is_in_government = yes
        						party ?= {
        							is_party_type = conservative_party
        						}
        					}
        					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
        					has_variable = fatherland_front_var
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_fatherland_front_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:AUS
        					c:AUS ?= THIS
        					NAND = {
        						any_interest_group = {
        							is_in_government = yes
        							party ?= {
        								is_party_type = fascist_party
        							}
        						}
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
        						has_variable = fatherland_front_var
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_christian_social_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:PEU
        					c:PEU ?= THIS
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_constitutional_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:ARG
        					c:ARG ?= THIS
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_national_autonomist_N

  text = {

  text = {

  text = {

        exists = c:SPA
        					c:SPA ?= THIS
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        c:POR ?= this
        					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        					ruler ?= {
        						has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        c:POR ?= this
        					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        					ruler ?= {
        						NOT = {
        							has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
        						}
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        c:POR ?= this
        					NOR = {
        						has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        						has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
        					}
        					NOT = {
        						has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        c:POR ?= this
        					NOR = {
        						has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        						has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
        					}
        					any_interest_group = {
        						leader = {
        							has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
        						}
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_national_republican_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        c:POR ?= this
        					NOR = {
        						has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        						has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
        					}
        					NOT = {
        						any_interest_group = {
        							leader = {
        								has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
        							}
        						}
        					}
        					has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_nationalist_republican_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party

        c:POR ?= this

        						has_law = law_type:law_monarchy

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        					OR = {
        						game_date <= 1837.1.1
        						has_gov_regency = yes
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
        					NOT = {
        						has_gov_regency = yes
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					OR = {
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
        					}
        					any_scope_state = {
        						state_region = s:STATE_BAHIA
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_SAO_PAULO
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_SAO_PAULO.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_bahia_republican_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					OR = {

PARTY_G_PARTY = {
  type = party
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:AUS
        					c:AUS ?= THIS
        					any_interest_group = {
        						is_in_government = yes
        						party ?= {
        							is_party_type = conservative_party
        						}
        					}
        					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
        					has_variable = fatherland_front_var
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_fatherland_front_G

PARTY_D_PARTY = {
  type = party
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:AUS
        					c:AUS ?= THIS
        					any_interest_group = {
        						is_in_government = yes
        						party ?= {
        							is_party_type = conservative_party
        						}
        					}
        					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state

PARTY_A_PARTY = {
  type = party
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      is_party_type = conservative_party
      owner = {
        exists = c:AUS
        					c:AUS ?= THIS
        					any_interest_group = {
        						is_in_government = yes
        						party ?= {
        							is_party_type = conservative_party
        						}
        					}
        					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
        					has_variable = fatherland_front_var
      }
    }

        					OR = {
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
        					}
        					any_scope_state = {
        						state_region = s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_SAO_PAULO
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_SAO_PAULO.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_BAHIA
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_minas_gerais_republican_party_A

PARTY_1_N = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_N
  }

      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }

              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy

        							}
        							leader ?= {
        								OR = {
        									has_ideology = ideology:ideology_ethno_nationalist
        									has_ideology = ideology:ideology_fascist
        								}
        							}
        						}
        					}
        					NAND = {
        						any_interest_group = {
        							is_in_government = yes
        							party ?= {
        								is_party_type = fascist_party
        							}
        						}
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_single_party_state
        						has_variable = fatherland_front_var
        					}

        }
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_greater_german_peoples_party_D

  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_A
  }

    trigger = {
      scope:party_1_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }

            c:POR ?= THIS

              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_A
  }

              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca

            }

PARTY_2_N = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_N
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_N
  }

      scope:party_2_scope ?= {

PARTY_2_D = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }

        is_party_type = communist_party
        owner = {
        					AND = {
        						OR = {
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:han
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:hakka
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:miao
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:min
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:zhuang
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:yi
        							country_has_primary_culture = cu:yue
        						}
        						any_interest_group = {
        							is_powerful = yes
        							leader ?= {
        								has_ideology = ideology:ideology_vanguardist
        							}
        						}
        					}

        }
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_cpc_D
  }

PARTY_2_A = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            any_interest_group = {
              leader = {
                has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_national_republican_party_A
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {

PARTY_2_I = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            any_interest_group = {
              leader = {
                has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_national_republican_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              any_interest_group = {
                leader = {
                  has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
                }
              }
            }
            has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda

    }
    localization_key = party_nationalist_republican_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            has_law = law_type:law_single_party_state

    }
    localization_key = party_national_union_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = liberal_party
      }
            country_has_primary_culture = cu:romanian

    }
    localization_key = party_national_liberal_party_I
  }

        is_party_type = liberal_party
      }
            country_has_primary_culture = cu:spanish

    }
    localization_key = party_progressive_party_I
  }

    trigger = {
      scope:party_2_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = liberal_party
      }

        is_party_type = conservative_party

            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_N
  }

      scope:party_3_scope ?= {

            exists = c:SPA

              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca

    }

  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
        owner = {
        					country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					OR = {
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
        					}
        					any_scope_state = {
        						state_region = s:STATE_BAHIA
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_SAO_PAULO
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_SAO_PAULO.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS
        							}
        						}

PARTY_3_D = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_D
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy

              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda

        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_SAO_PAULO
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_SAO_PAULO.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_BAHIA
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_MINAS_GERAIS.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp
        					}

        }
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_minas_gerais_republican_party_A
  }

PARTY_3_I = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_3_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_I

            c:TRS ?= THIS

    localization_key = party_conservative_N

PARTY_4_G = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_G
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_G
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {

      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = communist_party
        owner = {
        					c:POR ?= this
        					NOT = {
        						any_interest_group = {
        							leader = {
        								has_ideology = ideology:ideology_vanguardist
        							}
        						}
        					}

        }
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_maximalist_federation_G
  }

      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party

            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_D

            exists = c:SPA

PARTY_4_L = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              has_technology_researched = mass_propaganda
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_republican_union_party_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            any_interest_group = {
              leader = {
                has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_national_republican_party_L
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            NOR = {
              has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
              has_law = law_type:law_theocracy
            }
            NOT = {
              any_interest_group = {
                leader = {
                  has_template = POR_sidonio_pais
                }
              }
            }

PARTY_4_I = {
  type = country
  log_loc_errors = no

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:TRS ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_conservative_I
  }

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            exists = c:SPA
            c:SPA ?= THIS

    }
    localization_key = party_moderate_party_I
  }

    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party

            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_cartist_party_I
  }

    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
      }
            c:POR ?= THIS
            has_law = law_type:law_monarchy
            ruler ?= {
              NOT = {
                has_template = POR_maria_ii_de_braganca
              }
            }

    }
    localization_key = party_regenerator_party_I

  text = {
    trigger = {
      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = conservative_party
        owner = {
        					country_has_primary_culture = cu:brazilian
        					OR = {
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
        						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
        					}
        					any_scope_state = {
        						state_region = s:STATE_BAHIA
        					}
        					trigger_if = {
        						limit = {
        							any_scope_state = {
        								state_region = s:STATE_SAO_PAULO
        							}
        						}
        						s:STATE_BAHIA.region_state:BRZ.gdp > s:STATE_SAO_PAULO.region_state:BRZ.gdp

        						limit = {

      scope:party_4_scope ?= {
        is_party_type = social_democrats_party
        owner = {
        					exists = c:MEX
        					c:MEX ?= THIS

        }
      }
    }
    localization_key = party_laborist_party_I
  }
